arts.ttl: Five Barcelona players who could leave in January
arts.sum: Frenkie de Jong has been linked with a Barcelona exit for over a year now, as the Dutchman's deferred salary has seen him grossly overpaid within the constraints of the Blaugrana's new wage structure. Frenkie's wages would be hard to swallow even if he was playing at the peak of his powers, but instead the Dutchman is miles off his best and is lumbering around the field quite clearly still impacted by the ankle injury he got last season.
